ideation: This animation sequence will depict a rabbit's characteristic twitching nose and ears.  Since our robot lacks a nose, we'll simulate the twitching by subtly moving its arms, imagining the arms are the rabbit's ears. The arms will move in a gentle, almost imperceptible wave-like motion.  The overall effect should be cute and slightly whimsical, rather than realistic. Frame 1 will show the arms at rest, slightly angled outward and down.  Frames 2-4 will involve small, alternating movements of the arms, with one arm moving slightly upward and the other moving slightly downward, creating an illusion of twitching. Frame 5 will return to the rest position.  The wrist movements will be minimal, focusing on the subtle movements of the shoulders.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a rabbit's stillness
left arm twitches up, right arm dips down
right arm twitches up, left arm dips down
arms alternate their subtle, twitching dance
both arms settle back into gentle repose
